Wrong Display Name 'Entité à contacter en cas d'urgence' for https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R260-HL7RoleClass/FHIR/TRE-R260-HL7RoleClass#ECON. Valid display is 'personne à prévenir en cas d'urgence' (fr-FR) (for the language(s) 'fr-FR')

None of the codings provided are in the value set 'Patient relationship type' (http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/relatedperson-relationshiptype|4.0.1), and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R260-HL7RoleClass/FHIR/TRE-R260-HL7RoleClass#ECON)

None of the codings provided are in the value set 'Patient relationship type' (http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/relatedperson-relationshiptype|4.0.1), and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R216-HL7RoleCode/FHIR/TRE-R216-HL7RoleCode#NBOR)

Wrong Display Name 'Entité à contacter en cas d'urgence' for https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R260-HL7RoleClass/FHIR/TRE-R260-HL7RoleClass#ECON. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'personne à prévenir en cas d'urgence', 'ECON' (null) or 'personne à prévenir en cas d'urgence' (null) (for the language(s) 'fr-FR')

None of the codings provided are in the value set 'FR Core ValueSet Patient contact role' (https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/ValueSet/fr-core-vs-patient-contact-role|2.1.0), and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R260-HL7RoleClass/FHIR/TRE-R260-HL7RoleClass#ECON)

The ImplementationGuide uses package hl7.fhir.fr.core#2.1.0 released on 2024-09-04, but the most recent appropriate version is 2.2.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

The ImplementationGuide uses package hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0 released on 2025-02-10, but the most recent appropriate version is 5.3.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'personne à prévenir en cas d'urgence', 'ECON' (null) or 'personne à prévenir en cas d'urgence' (null) (for the language(s) 'fr-FR')

None of the codings provided are in the value set 'FR Core ValueSet Patient contact role' (https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/ValueSet/fr-core-vs-patient-contact-role|2.1.0), and a coding is recommended to come from this value set (codes = https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R260-HL7RoleClass/FHIR/TRE-R260-HL7RoleClass#ECON)

The left side is inherently a collection, and so the expression 'extension('http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-birthPlace').value as Address' may fail or return false if there is more than one item in the content being evaluated
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this profile

Published value sets SHOULD conform to the ShareableValueSet profile, which says that the element ValueSet.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
